title: quercus serrata var. latifolia
intro: Quercus serrata var. latifolia, also known as the Japanese evergreen oak, is a variety of deciduous tree native to East Asia, characterized by its broad, elliptical leaves and serrated edges. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Quercus serrata var. latifolia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into tea, capsules, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
